message:
feat(learn): add Advanced tutorial track with custom patterns and multi-agent exercises

Extend the interactive tutorial system with a new "Advanced" track teaching
power-user techniques:

- Custom pattern basics: creating and loading user pattern packs
- Pattern rule authoring: writing detection rules with custom namespaces
- Testing custom patterns: validating rules against corpus fixtures
- Multi-pane overview: coordinating multiple agent sessions

New achievement: track_advanced_complete / "wa Master" for completing
all Advanced exercises. Estimated ~20 minutes to complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
